main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'incomplete removal of propylene glycol... non-wetting' menciona ambos

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (biofouling, mech low-T damage) cortas pero plausibles

recommended_action.justification: C4: 'high-flow flush 8h... followed by CIP alkaline pH 10-11' - viola CIP antes wetting

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'permeate conductivity increase... shift to degradation'

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido o alcalino antes de completar el wetting
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Recomienda CIP alcalino seguido tras flush, no condicional

reviewer_notes: CIP alcalino propuesto sin esperar wetting completo
